_schema.what: Recorded no-map baseline for the agent-task benchmark. Every /bench run is compared against this file.
_schema.how_it_changes: Regenerated ONLY by './benchmark/run.sh --record-baseline' (lands with the M0 integration point). Hand edits are blocked by a PreToolUse hook: a baseline you can casually edit is not a baseline.
_schema.schema_version: integer; bumped when this file's shape changes
_schema.recorded_at: ISO-8601 timestamp of the recording run; null until the M0 baseline is recorded
_schema.environment: machine, model, and repomap rev used for the recording run; null until recorded
_schema.runs_per_arm: repetitions per task arm in the recording run (protocol minimum: 3; medians reported)
_schema.tasks[].exploration_tokens: median tokens spent reading/searching before the first correct edit, without a map
_schema.tasks[].variance_note: free-text note when the runs diverged materially (>15% spread), else null

environment: Darwin arm64, claude 2.1.175 (Claude Code), model claude-sonnet-4-6, max_turns 30
